description_long: This is a compact, weathered pickup truck with a single cab and an open cargo bed. The cab is painted white, but the paint is chipped and rusted, especially on the front bumper and lower panels, revealing signs of heavy use and age. The cargo bed is surrounded by green, rust-streaked metal panels, and the wooden floorboards inside the bed are visibly worn and discolored. The truck has two side mirrors, one of which is slightly bent, and the wheels are black with visible wear on the tires. Japanese characters are faintly visible on the side panels of the cargo bed, suggesting it may be a Japanese make or used in a Japanese urban setting. The overall appearance is utilitarian, functional, and indicative of a vehicle used for transporting goods or materials in an urban environment.
description: A small, weathered white pickup truck with a rusted green cargo bed and worn wooden floorboards, showing heavy use and age. Japanese writing on the side suggests it is likely of Japanese origin.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the rusted front bumper, chipped white cab, and green cargo bed with Japanese writing.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open cargo bed, worn wooden floor, and rusted metal panels.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the cargo bed's interior and the weathered side panels.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the rusted front, bent side mirror, and the cab's worn paint.
